title: Small Biome Towers
description: Adds biome-specific towers to the world
body:
This mod adds unique towers to different biomes.

- Towers can be found in: Plains, Swamp, Savanna, Desert, Beach, and Taiga biomes.
- There is also a tower for the End dimension.
- Each biome tower is different and contains biome-specific loot.
  
![End](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2c0faaa1b4965b03b3fece93b061f7d15f4570e_0.webp)
  ![Desert](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1065d389dc8eb7f1045b83fde33baf092de7a134_0.webp)
  ![Swamp](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/857e61f5756ca729ac2f629846537750dad29e66_0.webp)
  ![Savanna](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7893724919e5587a20e988d7e4e6571b473c25ed_0.webp)

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks
